Comments on: How optimism about buggy high throughput data might again cause damage (wonkish) http://www.brentlab.org/systems/2016/07/20/how-damage-via-optimism-induced-buggy-data-might-strike-again-wonkish/ Reviews and commentary about biological function by Roger Brent Sun, 21 Aug 2016 21:41:35 +0000 hourly 1 https://wordpress.org/?v=4.6.8 By: rbrent@fhcrc.org http://www.brentlab.org/systems/2016/07/20/how-damage-via-optimism-induced-buggy-data-might-strike-again-wonkish/#comment-11 Sun, 21 Aug 2016 21:41:35 +0000 http://www.brentlab.org/systems/?p=46#comment-11 This is a test comment
